title: Pooling Europe's compute
summary: Frontier AI training has needed compute at one site, hard in Europe given power, chip and political limits. RAND Europe finds distributed training eases the power and political constraints and pools Europe's scattered chips, but adds no new chips.

title: The Peace Corps

title: DNA Methylation: Applications to Living Marine Resource Management
summary: Introduction Deoxyribonucleic acid (DNA) is a molecule that contains the genetic information of an organism (Figure 1). It consists of two linked strands of alternating sugar and phosphate groups, which make up the “backbone” of the DNA. The two strands are connected by chemical bonds between the bases: adenine, cytosine, guanine, or thymine. The sequence of these bases encodes the biological information for the...
